title: angelica megaphylla
intro: Angelica megaphylla, also known as the Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Angelica megaphylla include its ability to regulate menstrual cycles, alleviate menstrual cramps, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Angelica megaphylla can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
